This '''[[Skakoan/Legends|Skakoan]]''' was an [[Elders (Skakoan)|Elder]] of the [[Power Mounds of the Elders|Power Mounds]] on the [[Planet/Legends|planet]] of [[Skako/Legends|Skako]].

{{Char-stub}}
